items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: Depends on type and scope. A simple website or bot takes 5-10 days, a mobile app or CRM takes 30-60 days.

items.question: What does the price depend on?
items.answer: The price depends on the service type, functionality scope, and project complexity. Get an exact quote through a free consultation.

items.question: What services do you offer?
items.answer: Website development, mobile apps, Telegram bots, CRM systems, technical support, and custom software development.

items.question: How does the process work after ordering?
items.answer: First a free consultation, then we develop the structure and prototype, confirm with you, and then development begins.

items.question: Is there technical support after delivery?
items.answer: Yes. All projects include 1 to 3 months of free technical support.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: 50% upfront payment when work begins, the remaining 50% after project delivery.
